subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Today the stream of mercy floweth, and the Sun of loving-kindness shineth resplendent. Blessed is the soul that through the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد امروز فرات رحمت جاری و آفتاب عنایت مشرق طوبی از برای نفسیکه بکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
